language.label: Language
language.description: Choose the language for the authenticated area. The same preference is also used on public pages.
language.settingsDescription: Italian is the default language. You can switch to English whenever you prefer.

hero.title: Farm records have never been this simple
hero.subtitle: The customizable digital field logbook that transforms operations management with artificial intelligence.

cards.title: For Farmers
cards.description: Optimize your daily work with simple, intuitive tools. Record field operations such as plowing, sowing, and other activities. Prepare compliant field records quickly, report issues with photos and field notes: everything in one place, with less paperwork and more time for production.

cards.title: For Agronomists
cards.description: Manage multiple farms at the same time with greater efficiency. Our digital tools let you follow your clients' field logs in a centralized, organized, and transparent way. Offer a more complete service, reduce errors, and increase the value of your professional consulting.

cards.title: For Trade Associations and Service Providers
cards.description: Expand your offering with an advanced digital consulting service for field logs. Support farmers, agronomists, and companies with modern, reliable tools, improving service quality and increasing satisfaction among your members or customers.

simplified.title: No more complex calculations, scattered sheets, or incomplete data.
simplified.body: Whether you are in the field, in the office, or on the move, our solution automates dosage calculations, integrates operations such as plowing and sowing, and lets you report problems with photos and field notes. All agronomic information lives in a single data source, fully aligned with regulations. A simple, precise, and immediate way to complete your field log without stress.

sections.title: Reduced time and costs
features: AI chat field notes to report problems and completed operations

features.title: Regulatory compliance
features.body: The system automatically checks every operation you record, making sure it complies with current regulations. Work with confidence knowing every treatment is correctly tracked and documentation is always ready for inspections.

features.title: Reduced time and costs
features.body: An interface so intuitive that anyone can use it from day one. Complete your field log in just a few clicks thanks to smart automations that calculate doses, suggest products, and save your recurring treatments.

features.title: Custom white label
features.body: Turn the platform into your own business solution with custom logo, colors, and domain. Configure fields, workflows, and features so the system fits exactly the way you work.

features.title: Integrates with third-party systems
features.body: Connect the field log to the software you already use through open APIs and automatic synchronizations. Bring all company information into one platform and let data flow freely between systems.

features.title: Operations and field notes
features.body: Record all field work, from plowing and sowing to treatments, and report issues directly from the field. Chat from the platform, Telegram, or WhatsApp: add photos and descriptions, and the AI assistant turns them into structured notes for the field log, without rewriting anything at the office.

contact.title: I'll arrange a free meeting
contact.body: Need information or want to see Seminai in action? Fill out the form below and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

footer.description: Transform the management of your fields with artificial intelligence.
footer.contactBody: Questions? We are here to help.

validation.required: Please fill in all required fields.
validation.invalidEmail: Please provide a valid email address.

status.error: An error occurred while sending the request.

toast.whatsappSetupComplete: WhatsApp setup completed. Scan the QR code.
toast.qrLoadError: Error while loading the QR code

cache.title: Cache management
cache.description: Delete the local cache associated with your account. This action cannot be undone.
cache.confirmDescription: This action will delete the cache associated with your account. To confirm, type delete in the field below.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.importantBody: The WhatsApp number used for this integration MUST be different from your personal number. If you connect your personal number, the integration will stop working correctly. We recommend using a dedicated WhatsApp Business number for your farm.
whatsapp.waitingBody: Scan the QR code with WhatsApp to complete the connection
whatsapp.notConnectedBody: Connect WhatsApp to send field notes through messages
whatsapp.scanTitle: Scan this QR code with WhatsApp:
whatsapp.instructions:
1. Open WhatsApp on your phone
2. Go to Settings → Linked devices → Link a device
3. Scan this QR code
whatsapp.allowlistInfo: If the list is empty, all numbers can send messages. After adding one or more numbers, only the listed numbers will be authorized.
whatsapp.emptyAllowlist: No numbers in the list — all numbers are allowed.
whatsapp.dialogDescription: Choose how to disconnect WhatsApp from your account.
whatsapp.disconnectSessionDescription: Disconnects the active session but keeps the instance. You can reconnect later by scanning a new QR code.
whatsapp.deleteInstanceDescription: Completely deletes the WhatsApp instance and removes all associated data. You will need to repeat the full setup to reconnect.

telegram.title: Telegram
telegram.scanTitle: Scan the QR code to connect the Telegram agent:
telegram.description: Open Telegram, scan the code, and start a chat with the bot to use the agent by message.

costs.title: Token cost history
costs.description: Detailed usage and costs calculated with Seminai margin.
costs.noData: No data to show. Apply filters or wait for new usage.
costs.barCaption: Usage by day and model (client cost €). Stacked bars with model names in the legend.
costs.lineCaption: Client cost (€) trend by day and model. One line for each model.
